title: The Midnight Library
author: Matt Haig
blurb: A woman steps into a magical library where each book reveals a different version of her life.

title: Pride and Prejudice
author: Jane Austen
blurb: A witty romance about manners, misunderstandings, and the slow dance of love.

title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
blurb: A practical guide to building habits that last with small, steady steps.

title: The House of the Spirits
author: Isabel Allende
blurb: A family saga full of secrets, passion, and the echoes of history.

title: Educated
author: Tara Westover
blurb: A powerful memoir about resilience, education, and reclaiming identity.

title: The Silent Patient
author: Alex Michaelides
blurb: A psychological thriller told through a chilling portrait of silence.

title: Tomorrow, and Tomorrow, and Tomorrow
author: Gabrielle Zevin
blurb: Two friends build a game studio and discover what friendship costs.

title: The Hobbit
author: J.R.R. Tolkien
blurb: A cozy and magical quest through mountains, dragons, and ancient lore.

title: Becoming
author: Michelle Obama
blurb: A candid memoir about family, ambition, and finding your voice.

title: The Vanishing Half
author: Brit Bennett
blurb: Twin sisters choose different paths and leave behind a shared legacy.

title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
blurb: A fable about chasing dreams and following the language of the heart.

title: Circe
author: Madeline Miller
blurb: A lyrical retelling of the life of the witch Circe from Greek myth.
